title: Why decks get messy
summary: Deck work gets hard when source, preview, and final PDF stop agreeing.

signals.title: Source
signals.body: The file no longer explains the visible slide.

signals.title: Context
signals.body: Audience and tone live outside the deck.

guardrails.title: One local loop
guardrails.body: Edit, preview, compare, and validate in the studio.

guardrails.title: Visible source
guardrails.body: Keep JSON close to the rendered slide.
